title: Vanilla Smooth🍃
description: Smoothly optimized modpack with a bunch of vanilla mods.
body:
## **Smooth & Optimized Modpack**

A carefully curated collection of performance, optimization, and quality-of-life mods designed to make your Minecraft experience smoother, lighter, and more enjoyable.
Enjoy faster loading times, stable FPS, and a more responsive game — all without losing the original Minecraft feel.
